message:
refactor(cli): route CLI and robot search through Search V3 service

CLI mail-search and robot-mode build_search both constructed FTS5 SQL
with manual LIKE fallback, duplicating logic that now lives in the
unified search service. Product search had the same pattern with
multi-project FTS5 + LIKE cascading.

Changes:
- mail-search: replace queries::search_messages with
  SearchQuery::messages + execute_search_simple; adapt field names
  (title, from_agent, Option wrappers)
- robot build_search: replace sanitize_fts_query + hand-built
  FTS5/LIKE SQL with SearchQuery + run_robot_search_query; parse
  importance and time_range into planner types
- robot resolve_agent_id: use exact lower() match instead of LIKE;
  prefer get_named over positional column access
- product search: remove 100-line FTS5/LIKE cascade; build
  SearchQuery::product_messages and delegate to execute_search_simple
- preflight_banner_stats: use open_sqlite_with_fallback for
  read-only startup counts, avoiding full migration work
- Remove unused query_table_count (moved after reorder)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
